title: teucrium chium
intro: Teucrium chium, also known as the alpine germander or chium germander, is a perennial plant species native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Teucrium chium include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
